zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon Sutton I於大約1392年出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，他的父親Robert Sutton39歲，母親Agnes24歲。他於1426年7月之前與Margaret Vavasour結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1434年被列為landowners 。他去世於大約1461年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon Sutton I于大约1392年出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，他的父亲Robert Sutton39岁，母亲Agnes24岁。他于1426年7月之前与Margaret Vavasour结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1434年被列为landowners 。他去世于大约1461年在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Eamonn
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon Sutton I was born about 1392, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Robert Sutton, was 39 and his mother, Agnes, was 24. He married Margaret Vavasour before July 1426. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1434, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as landowners . He died about 1461, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon Sutton I est né environ 1392, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Sutton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Vavasour avant juillet 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1434, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est landowners . Il est décédé environ 1461, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon Sutton I um 1392 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Sutton 39 und seine Mutter Agnes 24. Er hat vor Juli 1426 Margaret Vavasour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1434, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als landowners  aufgeführt. Er starb um 1461 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Sutton I è nato il circa 1392 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Sutton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Vavasour prima del luglio 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1434, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come landowners . Morì circa 1461, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon Sutton Iが約1392年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Robert Suttonは39歳，母Agnesは24歳であった。1426年7月以前にMargaret Vavasourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1434年，45歳の時，職業はlandowners と記録されている。彼は約1461年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon Sutton I(이)가 대략 1392년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Sutton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1426년 7월 이전 Margaret Vavasour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1434년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 landowners 이었다. 그는 대략 1461년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1392–about 1461: tany ho any amin'ny 1392–tany ho any amin'ny 1461

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Sutton I nasceu aproximadamente 1392, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Sutton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Vavasour antes julho de 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1434, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como landowners . Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1461, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon Sutton I родился около 1392 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Sutton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Vavasour перед июля 1426 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1434 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии landowners . Он умер около 1461 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

sm.about 1392–about 1461: e tusa o le 1392–e tusa o le 1461

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hamon Sutton I nació aproximadamente 1392, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Sutton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Vavasour antes de julio de 1426. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1434, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era landowners . Murió aproximadamente 1461, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
